title: Craftables
description: A Datapack that makes Uncraftable things Craftable!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad7c052a3856294552bc44f2dda4b471f0cba019.png) Craftables is a Minecraft datapack that adds over 85 recipies and lets you craft the uncraftable! Tired of hunting for rare loot like saddles, totems, or name tags? Now you can craft them all—straight from your crafting table. This pack brings balanced, logical recipes to items that normally can't be crafted in vanilla Minecraft. Great for survival players who want a more complete crafting experience!

## 📦 What's Craftable? Here’s the juicy list of items you’ll be able to craft: - Totem of Undying - Elytra (Very Hard) - Chainmail Armor - Enchanted Golden Apple - Wool ➡️ String - Gravel - Sand (via smelting dirt) - Trident - Horse Armors (Diamond, Gold, Iron) - All Ores (Diamond, Iron, Gold, etc.) - Skull of Skeleton (For Fun.) - Dragon's Breath - Glow lichen - Easy Recipe to get **Invisible** Item Frames and Glow Item Frames in Survival! - StoneCutter can be used as Wood Cutter! ## 🧪 Recipe Highlights - 🔸 Totem of Undying – 2 Emeralds + 4 Gold Blocks + 1 Diamond - 🔸 Chainmail Armor – Crafted like normal armor, but with Chains - 🔸 Enchanted Golden Apple – 8 Gold Blocks + 1 Golden Apple - 🔸 String – 1 Wool gives you 4 Strings - 🔸 Gravel – 1 Dirt + 1 Water Bucket (you get the bucket back) - 🔸 Sand – Smelt 1 Dirt in a Furnace - 🔸 Trident – 2 Breeze Rods + 3 Prismarine Shards - 🔸 Ores – Place the raw material in the center, surround with stone - 🔸 Horse Armor – 4 of any material (Iron/Gold/Diamond) + 1 Leather - 🔸 Skeleton's Skull – Place a Bone Block in a stone cutter and you will get the head - 🔸 Dragon's Breath – Place Glass Bottle and End Crystal in any shape - 🔸 Elytra – Requires 3 Leather, 3 Phantom Membrane, And 1 Netherite Ingot - 🔸 Invisible Item and Glow Item Frame – The item itself and a Fermented Spider Eye - 🔸 Use Planks in StoneCutter to get Wood Items Efficiently > 📸 Check the gallery for visuals of each recipe! ## ⬇️ How to Install 1. Download the .zip file from Modrinth 2. While creating a new Minecraft world, go to the Datapacks tab 3. Click “Open Datapack Folder”, then paste the .zip file inside 4. Start your world and you're all set—craft away! 🔥 Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or redstone genius, this pack adds a ton of value without breaking the vanilla feel. Perfect for long-term survival worlds!
